concepts: compression release with retained higher-value acceptance

thesis_hint: Explore a new concept this cycle. Live context still says the only clearly repeatable positive walk-forward cluster is ETH/1h channel-shortbias, but that lane dominates the scored evidence across family, asset, timeframe, and concept, while same-family refinements have already degraded into a zero-trade fail and a six-trade collapse. Reflection still shows the broader search is mostly non-promising, so another immediate exploit turn would over-farm the same family, asset, timeframe, and concept. Stay inside the supported universe and rotate to TAO/4h with 3 materially different but density-aware continuation structures: one continuous trend-state pullback branch that stays active while price holds above a rising medium anchor, one failed-breakdown value-reacceptance branch that turns on once downside excess is reclaimed without theatrical gating, and one compression-release branch that only requires retained higher-value acceptance after expansion. Do not clone ETH channel, ETH KAMA-stoch, or ETH tail-harvester logic, and do not recycle the recent BABY/SOL zero-trade event grammar.
stop_condition: Stop the batch when either (A) one spec reaches walk-forward QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.12, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 10.0, or (B) 4 materially different specs are exhausted without a pass. Abort any spec with total_trades < 12, profit_factor < 1.00, or max_drawdown_pct > 12.0.
rotation_reason: Force exploration this cycle: ETH/1h channel-shortbias still dominates the live scored evidence across family, asset, timeframe, and concept, while recent completed failures already cover BABY/1h and SOL/4h, so TAO/4h is a clean supported rotation that broadens the search while preserving the explore-heavy balance.
